message:
fix(priming): add town root CLAUDE.md to gt install and gt doctor

When Claude Code starts, it rebases CWD to the git root (~/gt/), so
the Mayor's CLAUDE.md at mayor/CLAUDE.md is never loaded. After
compaction, the Mayor loses its identity anchor and drifts to crew
member identities discovered through workspace interaction.

Changes:
- gt install: creates a generic, non-role-specific CLAUDE.md at the
  town root as an identity anchor for Mayor/Deacon
- gt doctor: checks for missing town root CLAUDE.md (fixable)

Crew and polecats have nested git repos and won't inherit this file.

Ref: gt-uybei

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
